provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Increased Jurisdiction Order.

provisions.title: Increased jurisdiction
provisions.content:
2. Increased jurisdiction
Chief Magistrates, Senior Magistrates and Magistrates Grade I shall have power to try all offences contrary to the Penal Code (Cap. 08:01), other than offences contrary to sections 34 to 38, 42, 53, 62 to 65, 200, 202, 208, 217 to 219, 222 and 224, and attempts to commit such offences.

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Magistrates' Grade II (Increased Powers of Punishment) Order.

provisions.title: Increased powers of punishment
provisions.content:
2. Increased powers of punishment
Magistrates Grade II are hereby authorised to award sentences of imprisonment up to and including 5 years or to impose fines up to and including P10,000, or both.
